name: multiply
asm:
0x140001464      PUSH     RBP
  0x140001465      MOV      RBP, RSP
  0x140001468      MOV      dword ptr [RBP + 0x10], ECX
  0x14000146B      MOV      dword ptr [RBP + 0x18], EDX
  0x14000146E      MOV      EAX, dword ptr [RBP + 0x10]
  0x140001471      IMUL     EAX, dword ptr [RBP + 0x18]
  0x140001475      POP      RBP
  0x140001476      RET
